phases.name: Foundation (AsyncStorage + Types + DS components)
phases.notes: AsyncStorage chosen over MMKV to stay on Expo Go (no native build needed). Types: Product + RoutineStep extended with openedDate/paoMonths/scheduledDays. DS components ported: Button, Card, IconButton, ListRow, Tag, Input, Checkbox, Switch, SegmentedControl.

phases.name: Onboarding Stack
phases.notes: MarketingSlidesScreen, SkinProfileSetupScreen, FirstProductScreen implemented. OBF search extracted to src/services/openBeautyFacts/. generateId() utility added. Tech-lead blockers B1-B4 + warnings W1-W7 resolved.

phases.name: Today Screen
phases.notes: InlineAlert.tsx ported to RN. ClinicalRestrictionsBlock reads proceduresStore + date-based rehab window check. SeasonalNoticeBanner calls getCurrentSeason() + dismissedBanners gate. RoutinesScreen: collapsible AM/PM sections, RoutineStepCard with gamification-aware checkbox, EmptySlotPlaceholder with hide + navigate-to-catalog. routinesStore: seeds default AM/PM on first launch, normalises scheduledDays. AppNavigator wired to RoutinesScreen.

phases.name: Weekly Plan
phases.notes: WeeklySchedulePicker (day chips, every-day ↔ specific-days toggle), ConflictWarningInline (ConflictEngine.detectConflicts across all routine steps, deduplicated amber InlineAlerts), WeeklyPlanView (AM/PM SegmentedControl + DraggableFlatList with ScaleDecorator + hidden-step preservation on drag end + ListFooterComponent conflict warnings). RoutinesScreen wired: view='today'|'weekly' state, useEffect sets headerRight 'Edit Schedule'/'Done' button + headerTitle via navigation.setOptions.

phases.name: Catalog Screen
phases.notes: ProductsScreen: FlatList with local search filter, edit/delete action icons per card, header '+' button via navigation.setOptions. AddProductModal: two-phase (OBF search with 600ms debounce → form, or manual entry); form fields: name, brand, product-type chip row, active-ingredient multi-select, usage-time SegmentedControl, INCI textarea, 'Add to routine' quick-link (none/AM/PM/AM&PM); pre-fills when editingProduct prop provided. DeleteProductModal: fade overlay with destructive confirmation. Routine linking: addProductToRoutine creates new RoutineStep in matching routine(s) on save.

phases.name: Clinic Screen
phases.notes: ProcedureLifespanCard: computeStatus() derives live status from datePerformed+config (not stored field); LifespanBar percentage-fill with status-matched color; FadingInteractivePrompt with defer (max 3×)/mostly-faded (realDuration input)/archive branches. AddProcedureModal: 6-option radio list with rehab+effect metadata; DD/MM/YYYY date input with Today quick-fill and future-date guard; live collision/seasonal/phototype InlineAlerts from ConflictEngine. ClinicScreen: MonthTimelineBar (12-month horizontal strip with per-month dots); FlatList sorted by recency (archived pushed last); header '+' via navigation.setOptions; reuses DeleteProductModal for procedure removal. computeStatus + getProgress extracted to src/utils/procedureLifespanHelpers.ts by qa-lead.

phases.name: Profile Screen
phases.notes: SkinProfileEditModal: pageSheet slide-up with all skin profile fields (gender chips, age input, skin type chips, PhototypeCard row, concerns multi-select, SPF sensitivity Switch), pre-fills from profileStore on open, Cancel+Save footer. ProfileScreen: profile summary chips (gender/age/skin type/phototype), concerns as dot-joined text, edit trigger, product+procedure counts stats bar, Gamification Switch via ListRow (settingsStore), SPF Sensitivity Switch (profileStore), local-data InlineAlert, Export via Share.share() with full JSON backup of all stores, version row.

phases.name: Polish & All-States Audit
phases.notes: All-states audit passed across all screens — hydration spinner in App.tsx covers load state; every FlatList has a ListEmptyComponent; AM/PM sections have EmptySection. Three fixes applied: (1) parseDateInput W-A: added date.getDate/getMonth cross-check after Date construction to reject overflowed dates like April 31 → May 1. (2) OBF error state: searchProducts returns {products, failed}; AddProductModal and FirstProductScreen now show 'Search unavailable' with wifi-off icon when API fails, distinct from 'No results found'. (3) tsc clean + 105/105 tests green after all changes.

open_questions.description: OBF API rate limits and terms of use for production scale
Clinical disclaimer copy sign-off from licensed practitioner
Expo dev client build pipeline for MMKV native module
open_questions.resolution: Moot — storage decision changed to AsyncStorage. Expo Go compatible, no native build required.
